candidates.why: Exact candidate that represents top-line revenue; matches Net sales values and is the reported total revenue line.

variables.notes: Selected reported revenue total as the preferred top-line line.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: Direct cost line under revenue; standard COGS concept.
Also a direct COGS label, but appears to duplicate the main COGS row exactly, so less preferred.

candidates.row_label: of which Cost of goods and services sold
candidates.why: A subcomponent/'of which' line, not the main COGS amount.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Explicit balancing row, should be excluded.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of goods and services sold

variables.notes: Preferred the main direct cost row over the duplicate 'Cost of Revenues/COGS' and excluded 'of which' and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.
Clear SG&A overhead component above EBIT.
Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; included in XSGA as well so XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.

candidates.row_label: Other operating income and operating expenses
candidates.why: Broad operating bucket that includes both income and expense and may include non-overhead/nonrecurring items; less clean than explicit components.
Gross R&D amount is not the recognized expense line and would risk mismatch/double count.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. No explicit single SG&A subtotal row exists. Selected clean overhead components above EBIT. Included 'Research and development expenses' in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well as XRD so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD yields SG&A excluding R&D. Excluded 'Other operating income and operating expenses' because it is mixed income/expense and not a clean overhead component.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.
Gross spend, not necessarily the recognized P&L expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization line, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/ loss items
candidates.why: Core recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component that should be included alongside interest expense when using components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; do not use together with the main lease-interest row.
Broader finance cost bucket that includes FX and other items; avoid if granular recurring components exist.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and similar profit/ loss items
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components and avoided broader 'Financial expenses' to exclude FX/other non-interest items. Did not include the supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best owner-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and satisfies BE rule.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner-only equity exists.
Semantically relevant but appears unlabeled/empty in preview and less clearly the reported total than the explicit total attributable line.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent-only equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Standard minority interest/NCI balance sheet line.
Equivalent duplicate line with identical values; less preferred than standard NCI wording.
Income statement allocation line, not the balance sheet minority equity line preferred for MIB.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Selected the balance-sheet NCI line and not the duplicate 'Minority Interest' row to avoid repetition.
